title: ghastly ghouls
description:
miniscule yet monstrous texture pack that reskins the three basic zombie types into more monstrous and terrible forms.
meant to be used alongside my other mods
body:
this is a texture pack that redesigns the three zombie types into far more ghoulish and terrifying forms.
this mod is meant to be used alongside my muc bigger forge mod for 1.20.1, "The Dead", as it focusses on various ghoulies.

the basic zombie gets a rotten makeover, with a lipless mouth and a lidless gaze, his brains exposed to the open air and his clothes in tatters.

the husk is redisigned to look like so dessicated, mummified corpse, with a bloodshot gaze and pursed lips

the drowned is the most interesting, with his body decomposing so thoroughly in the salty waters that the skin has turned a rotten oily black, leaving only a sparse few teeth floating about in his distended mouth

how spooky!
